record.field: Action required: payment issue with your Dojang membership

Hi ,

We were unable to process the latest payment for your membership at .

Please update your payment information as soon as possible to avoid any interruption to your membership.

  • View and pay your outstanding invoices in your member portal.
  • If you believe this is an error, please contact us directly.

If payment is not received within 30 days, your membership may be suspended.

Thank you,
